rows.label: qev025114_MSG0001
rows.name: What's up with this guy called Aqual...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0002
rows.name:
Gerome-san finally got serious
and stood back up, and he just
has to come and get in the way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0003
rows.name:
If he gets carried away and tries
to talk to me anymore, I'll
seriously beat him to a pulp![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0005
rows.name:
I reckon he's probably eating around
Save Park right about now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0006
rows.name:
He's probably pretty pissed off
thanks to getting tangled up
with you and Aqual earlier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0007
rows.name:
If you're planning on asking any
more weird questions, be prepared
to get punched two or three times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0008
rows.name:
I heard the sound of an explosion
coming from the Residential
Area, did something happen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0009
rows.name:
Don't tell me the aliens caused a
terrorist attack or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0010
rows.name:
It seems Gerome-san headed that way...
I hope he didn't get caught up in it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0011
rows.name:
Gerome-san went to get food and
hasn't come back at all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0012
rows.name:
Jeez... Did he eat something bad
and ruin his stomach or what?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025114_MSG0013
rows.name:
*Sigh*... He was finally getting his
groove back recently, so I hope he
hasn't gotten into any weird trouble...[ST:wait ]
